   - This could force them to re-evaluate their offer or accept a trade more favorable to me.
   - If they refuse, I can accept their final offer or pass.

   - Offer to trade 5 Y for 5 X.
   - This keeps my Y-to-X ratio more balanced and maximizes my total resources.
